3161690.name: The Grove
3161690.description:
DESCRIPTION

No one knows the full truth about the place. It's a dead grove of trees on the outskirts of town that's been pigeonholed as a sort of haunted forest by the locals for ages. They like to theorize and come up with wild rumors. No one has had the courage to bite the bullet and actually go in and explore the place. Who knows what's in there?

FEATURES

  • A dark, immersive atmosphere that will transport the player right into the shoes of the protagonist

  • A rich, detailed world with plenty for the player to discover and explore

  • An environment that will constantly keep the player on their toes

  • A masterfully made soundtrack that will further immerse the player into the world

  • Intense puzzle-like sequences that require the player to think on their feet
